complaintDesc:
Subject Complaint Regarding Excessive Train Delay Causing Missed Connecting Train

Sir/Madam

My train has been delayed by more than 3 hours without proper information. Due to this unnecessary delay I missed my connecting train and have faced significant inconvenience financial loss and mental stress.

I request Indian Railways to investigate the reason for the delay take appropriate action and consider my case for compensation/refund as per applicable rules.

Journey Details

- Train Number 12788
- PNR 4653945621
- Date of Journey  14/07/2026

Kindly resolve this complaint at the earliest.

Thank you.
remarks: We regret the inconvenience caused to you. The train was running late h/o by NED division by 113" late, train running out of path. However, concern staff have been instructed to minimize the delay of the train and Your request is noted and will forward the proposal to Headquarters for further process.  We thank you for your valuable feedback and assure you of our best services

complaintDesc: AI Generated Complaint Description The air conditioning in my coach is not working
feedbackRemark: No quick action was taken. Full night was sopiled.no change in railways before and now .
remarks:
Sir, sorry for the inconvenience caused. The passenger's complaint was regarding less cooling in Coach No. A2-232521 a
 Berth No. 2. As reported by the onboard ACCI, Sri. V. Rakesh (9063321354), the coach was checked and the blower was found to be not working. The matter was informed to BZA Control for necessary attention. At BZA station, an OHE block was taken, the defective blower motor was replaced, and the blower is now functioning normally. The AC system has been restored, and the issue has been resolved. For any further electrical queries or assistance, please contact 9346902778 / 9701344218. Indian Railways is committed to ensuring a comfortable, safe, and secure journey for its passengers.
